# Oz Tamir

> Developer, marketer, maker, and meme-generator — all packed into one person.
> This is the personal homepage at oztamir.com, linking out to Oz's writing and talks.

Oz Tamir builds software and side projects, writes about engineering, and gives
technical talks. The homepage is a minimal single-page site; most of the actual
content lives on the blog and talks sites linked below.

## Main

- [Blog](https://posts.oztamir.com/): Long-form posts on engineering, side projects, and tools Oz has built.
- [Talks](https://talks.oztamir.com/): Slides, recordings, and write-ups from technical talks.
- [Homepage](https://oztamir.com): This site.

## Code & social

- [GitHub](https://github.com/OzTamir): Open-source projects, including this homepage.
- [Twitter/X](https://twitter.com/oztamir)
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/oz-tamir-7179b185)
- [Email](mailto:oz@tamir.fun)
